nasb.text: And it will be said, “Build up, build up, prepare the way, Remove every obstacle out of the way of My people.”

esv.text: And it shall be said, “Build up, build up, prepare the way, remove every obstruction from my people’s way.”

cnv.text: 必有人說： “你們要填高，要填高，要修平道路； 把障礙物從我子民的路上除掉。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “要修路，修路，铺平道路， 清除我子民路上的障碍。”

csbs.text: 耶和华说： “筑起，筑起！预备道路！ 移除我子民路上的绊脚石！”
